completed_tasks.name: UI-SPEC blocking issues fixed (typography, spacing, focal points)
RESEARCH.md — codebase inventory, CD resolutions, plan decomposition

remaining_tasks.name: 999.8-01-data-foundation (Wave 1): 8 models + Alembic 0054 + markdown filter + sidebar + router skeleton
999.8-02-admin-crud (Wave 2): block/expert admin CRUD + HTMX filters + media fieldset
999.8-04-apply-and-project-tab (Wave 3): copy-on-apply + hint service (4/6 triggers) + kanban.html tab refactor + checklist + /api/playbook-step-route endpoint
999.8-05-banner-and-seed (Wave 3): 2 banner endpoints + playbook_banner.html/js + base.html include + seed demo script

decisions.rationale: Phase is large (walking-skeleton MVP with 8 tables, drag-drop builder, banner, hint logic) — code inventory needed to resolve CDs and avoid planning assumptions
CONTEXT.md warned 10+ plans unverifiable; RESEARCH.md recommended 5-7; we picked 5 to balance verification and parallelization

decisions.decision: /api/playbook-step-route endpoint owned by Plan 04, not Plan 05
decisions.rationale: Checker B3: both plans are Wave 3 with non-deterministic ordering; Plan 04 Task 3 template depends on this endpoint, so it must be defined in the same plan. Plan 05 keeps only the 2 banner-display endpoints.

decisions.decision: hx-trigger='intersect once' for lazy-loaded playbook tab (not 'revealed')
decisions.rationale: Checker B1: style.display toggling does not reliably fire 'revealed'; 'intersect once' matches the existing crm/detail.html pattern

decisions.decision: CommerceCheckJob/BriefJob hint triggers return False with TODO(999.8.1)
decisions.rationale: These models lack project_id/site_id FKs — time-only filtering would produce wildly imprecise hints. Safer to skip in MVP and revisit in 999.8.1.

decisions.decision: Markdown filter added as new wave-1 task (Markdown>=3.6,<4.0 + markupsafe.Markup wrapper)
decisions.rationale: RESEARCH.md confirmed python-markdown is NOT installed; channel.py has guarded import but it's not a dependency

decisions.decision: Sidebar registration via app/navigation.py NAV_SECTIONS (data-driven), not hardcoded in sidebar.html
decisions.rationale: RESEARCH.md discovered existing data-driven pattern — respect it

decisions.decision: kanban.html will be refactored in-place into tabbed layout
decisions.rationale: Currently standalone page, not tabbed. D-14 requires Playbook as a project-page tab. Risk acknowledged in Plan 04 (highest-risk plan).

uncommitted_files_note: Pre-existing modifications unrelated to 999.8 (crawl feed work from earlier session). Untouched by plan-phase.
next_action: Run /gsd:execute-phase 999.8 to start Wave 1 (Plan 01: data foundation). Recommend /clear first for fresh context window.
context_notes: Phase 999.8 is fully planned and verified. 2 checker iterations — all 3 blockers + 4 majors + 1 minor addressed. Plans committed as 2ba5428. Ready for execution. Walking-skeleton MVP: admin builds reusable PlaybookBlock library → assembles Playbook templates → applies to Project → live checklist on project tab → step navigation via full-width banner overlay → hint-badges on tab load. Phase is BACKLOG (requirements_addressed empty). Stack: SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + Alembic + Jinja2+HTMX + Sortable.js 1.15.0 CDN + python-markdown. Russian UI throughout.
